Localization.Description: Extended attributes of an object are changed

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to change extended attributes of a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The user {subject.account.name} changed extended attributes of the file object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} changed extended attributes of a file object on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} as {object.account.name} changed extended attributes of a file object on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} changed extended attributes of the file object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
Extended attributes of a file object is changed on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} as {object.account.name} failed to change extended attributes of a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} failed to change extended attributes of a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The user {subject.account.name} as {object.account.name} changed extended attributes of the file object "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host}
Extended attributes of the file object "{object.fullpath}" is changed on host {event_src.host}
Failed to change extended attributes of a file object on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The user {subject.account.name} changed extended attributes of a file object on host {event_src.host}
